title: selaginella blepharodella
intro: Selaginella blepharodella, also known as the 'Eyelid Spikemoss', is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing sore throats. Selaginella blepharodella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
